title: Decoration Perfomance
description: Decoration, technology and optimization in a single modpack!
body:
## 💻Release Requirements (May change according to time.)

#### Minimum: CPU 4/6 Cores, 2GB allocated ram(minecraft), Opengl 4.0 Video Card

#### Recommended: CPU 6/8 Cores, 2GB allocated ram(minecraft), GTX or RX Series Video Card

# About 📝

**Modpack for those who are fans of making houses, cities, states, countries, entire worlds with exceptional mods to make it easier and better to enjoy new ways of characterizing a place**. And that at the same time you can enjoy the mods that optimize minecraft as a whole, and that facilitate the accessibility of people who may not run the best way without these mods.

# Objective ✨

The goal of the modpack is to have something that can help people who are in need of something missing in their buildings. So, the modpack has a model about each part similar to real life that **helps to create more immersive and understandable environments.**
The modpack also brings a part of mods that focuses especially on a good multiplayer experience, so that every time you can demonstrate your builds you and your friends can have a great multiplayer experience.

# Open development 👥

Of course, for this type of modpack, help, ideas, problems that are generated, need a large community behind it. So that the modpack is as stable and viable as possible to play. so if you want to make a contribution *(even saying your opinion of what the modpack could be about a specific subject)*, **be sure to visit our [github page!](https://github.com/lostopkk/Decoration-Perfomance)**

# Disclaimer ❗

There will be mods that are not properly updated, so in case of changes, stay tuned to our [github](https://github.com/lostopkk/Decoration-Perfomance) for information *(but don't worry, we will probably let you know if you have any unresolved irregularities and you will be duly notified in the changelogs)*

**Like mods for both modrinth and curseforge, it's really hard to see which mods can be added or removed, so if any author has any copyright issues about modpack, they can create an issue on github about the subject that will be resolved as quickly as possible**
